reference.text: 这地方倒是挺清静的刚好适合一个人做点研究

validated_samples.text: 这项实验还没有结束，请继续观察它的变化。

notes: This package is for local personal research only.
The reference audio provides voice/style conditioning for inference.
The original GPT-SoVITS checkout in this workspace includes local compatibility patches for offline Chinese inference and soundfile WAV loading.
